issues.description: Condition checks if Nefeltari Vivi is on board, but card text says 'If your Leader is [Nefeltari Vivi]' — should use LeaderIsName condition, not HasCardOnBoard
Second effect missing [Once Per Turn] restriction — needs TurnCount condition with limit:1

TrashFromHand is not conditional; text says 'You may trash 1 card' then 'Give up to 1 rested DON!!' — the AttachDon should only trigger if player chooses to trash, or card text structure needs clarification. Current DSL implies trash is mandatory.
Target allows any own Character or Leader, but card text specifies 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card' — should verify resting state is checked (HasRestingDon filter may be needed)
